title: FOIL Algorithm Flowchart
description: A flowchart illustrating the sequential process of learning a first-order rule using the FOIL (First Order Inductive Learner) algorithm.
elements: Start with most general rule (e.g., Target(X) :- true)
Select a positive example not covered by current rule
Specialize the rule by adding a literal
Evaluate gain of the new candidate specializations
Terminate when rule covers no negatives
relationships: Process flows sequentially from Start, through iterative specialization and evaluation loops, until a termination condition is met, producing a final learned rule.
